query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A monochrome close-up of a whole apple resting on a smooth, light-toned surface against a completely black backdrop. A thin band of bright light traces the left curve of the apple and catches its small stem, while the rest of the fruit recedes into deep darkness. A sharp, elongated shadow stretches from the base of the apple across the surface toward the right.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A monochrome close-up of a whole apple rendered with deliberate extreme underexposure that crushes nearly all shadow detail into pure black. A thin band of bright light traces the left curve of the apple and catches its small stem, while the majority of the fruit dissolves into unrecoverable darkness and merges with the background. A sharp, elongated shadow stretches from the base of the apple across the pale surface toward the right, creating a stark, graphic composition defined by severe exposure extremes.
